penalties.description: No actual cutting performance was observed in the video frames. Only instructional content and FLS equipment overview were shown.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Claude identified this as an instructional video with no actual task performance, while GPT-4o scored it as a completed cutting task. Given the fundamental disagreement about whether any performance occurred, Claude's assessment of no performance takes precedence as it represents the more conservative evaluation when visual evidence is disputed.
